channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump welcomes release of detained American woman by Iran amid continuing regional tensions
item.description: US President Donald Trump publicly thanked Iran after the release of Dena Karari, an American citizen who had been detained in Iran since December 2024. In a post on Truth Social, Trump described her ...

item.title: Government proposes teacher salary adjustments to prevent industrial action

item.title: DCP Commends IEBC Conduct in Ol Kalou By-Election Amid Minor Procedural Concerns

item.title: Scientists Discover Sugar Molecule in Interstellar Space
item.description: Astronomers have detected a sugar molecule, specifically glycolaldehyde, in the interstellar space of the star-forming region Sagittarius B2. This discovery, published in *The Astrophysical Journal*, ...

item.title: Challenges Facing Tanzania's Legal Profession Amid Mega Projects

item.title: Ramaphosa seeks court order to suspend impeachment proceedings over Phala Phala inquiry

item.title: MMDA Suspends Gabriel Go’s Clearing Operations Following Teacher-Shaming Incident
item.description: The Metropolitan Manila Development Authority (MMDA) has suspended the clearing operations of its official, Gabriel Go, following an incident where he publicly reprimanded a teacher for not wearing a ...

item.title: Nigeria's Food Prices Rise Despite Slight Inflation Drop
item.description: Nigeria's overall inflation eased slightly in June 2026, but food prices kept climbing. Food inflation hit 17.52%, driven by staples like garri, tomatoes, yam, and crayfish. Experts say headline infla...

item.title: Daily Horoscope for July 16, 2026: Guidance for Each Zodiac Sign
item.description: This article provides personalized horoscope predictions for each zodiac sign on July 16, 2026. Aries is urged to complete mundane tasks promptly to free up time for more exciting activities. Taurus i...

item.title: AI Startup Uses Brain Data to Diagnose Cognitive Disorders
item.description: Gidi Littwin, co-inventor of Apple’s FaceID and Vision Pro technologies, has founded Hemispheric, an AI startup aiming to revolutionize brain health diagnostics. The company raised $52 million after a...

item.title: Government sells Atrium of Makati units to boost public funds
item.description: The Department of Finance (DOF) announced the sale of 24 condominium units and 21 parking spaces in the decades-old Atrium of Makati, a low-rise building along Makati Avenue, to Sanpiro Realty Develop...

item.description: The article discusses the United States' strategic involvement in Libya's political landscape, focusing on efforts to stabilize the country through elite agreements rather than democratic elections. E...

item.title: Public Officials Spend KSh 760K on World Cup Tickets Amid Citizen Struggles

item.description: The UK's communications regulator, Ofcom, has launched an investigation to check if TikTok is following laws to protect children online. The probe focuses on whether TikTok's age verification system m...

item.title: Argentina vs Spain in FIFA World Cup 2026 final: A clash of titans

item.title: ANU's FOI delays and political fallout: Implications for Andrew Wilkie and high-profile figures' trip to Italy
